race.comment: Could easily make a case for a dozen of them with the right run. LONTANO (4) could be value. Was less than a length from Geese Strawberry here last time and as well weighted as she is still meets her better at the weight with the claim for Pan. Drawn well and will be close to the speed. Best form is at this trip and should be ready to fire. SKELMORLIE (5) hit the line hard to score last time over the mile and will be even fitter for it. Can measure up again. TOGANMAIN (11) was a fresh-up winner over 1400m then split Geese Strawberry and LONTANO last time. Fitter again and will take catching. IT'S JAGGER TIME (1) will be well fancied on the three consecutive seconds this campaign. Overdue and should be in the finish again. BERSERKER (3) has been freshened since finishing fourth latest and can atone. Chances don't end there.
